tagline: Error bars on line charts: Line charts now support displaying error bars as bands.
what_it_does: Error bars on line charts: Line charts now support displaying error bars as bands. Custom SQL measure bug fix (Public Preview): Fixed a bug where a measure defined using the custom SQL option would fail if a dataset scoped measure didn't specify the full name path. For example, sum(orders.field) was previously required rather than sum(field).
why_it_matters: Reduces operational overhead and unlocks new capabilities for data teams on Databricks.
key_takeaway: Error bars on line charts: Line charts now support displaying error bars as bands.
